response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified two distinct musical performances based on on-screen text ('青春アーカイブ' and '夢見る空へ'). 2. Identified performers using visual character recognition (Tokoyami Towa, Tsunomaki Watame for Song 1; Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel, Houshou Marine for Song 2). 3. Performed DuckDuckGo searches: '"Seishun Archive" Hololive Japanese and English lyrics' and '"Yume Miru Sora e" Hololive Japanese and English lyrics'. 4. Found corresponding lyrics and compiled the required JSON output.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley performed by different Hololive VTubers. The first song, 'Seishun Archive', is performed by Tokoyami Towa and Tsunomaki Watame. The second song, 'Yume Miru Sora e', is performed by Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel, and Houshou Marine.

scenes.description: Tokoyami Towa and Tsunomaki Watame perform the song 'Seishun Archive' on stage. The song title appears in the top-left.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: 信じ合う仲間と一緒に 挑戦の狼煙をあげよう 終わらない 青春に Woah-woah-woah-oh-oh. Boys and girls 羞恥心は捨てて Hey, jump! みんなで揃えば Cool jump! Jump!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Together with friends who believe in each other, let's raise the smoke of a challenge. To the endless youth, Woah-woah-woah-oh-oh. Boys and girls, throw away your shyness, hey jump! If we all get together, cool jump!

scenes.description: Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel, and Houshou Marine perform 'Yume Miru Sora e'. The song title appears in the top-left.
scenes.song_title: Yume Miru Sora e (夢見る空へ)
scenes.performer_in_video: Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel, Houshou Marine
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: 重ねた手はギュッと 離さずに 行くよ！（行こう！） 夢見る空へ. 窓越しに見上げた とても小さな空 ここで出会えたのは 数え切れないキセキ. 繰り返した一歩が キラメキをつないで 星のような笑顔 導いた day by day みんなの声がチカラになる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Don't let go of the overlapping hands, let's go! To the dreaming sky. The very small sky I looked up at through the window. What I met here is countless miracles. Every repeated step connects the sparkle. Guided by a star-like smile, day by day, everyone's voice becomes my strength.
